requirements.statement: Orders reserve inventory before payment is captured.
requirements.why: Overselling reserved stock is a refund storm.

requirements.statement: Inventory reservations expire after a fixed 15 minutes.
requirements.why: Predecessor of the adaptive expiry; kept for history.

requirements.statement: Inventory reservations expire adaptively based on checkout load.
requirements.why: Fixed expiry punished slow-but-real buyers at peak.
